opportunities.title: Close the preview->signup leak: invert the gate (value-first), wire founder signup events
opportunities.problem: Founders reach the value moment (32 url_submitted, 39 preview_requested, 10 match_viewed in 7d) but 0 create an account (founder_signup_started=0, completed=0). preview->account conversion = 0%.
opportunities.hypothesis: Delivering the full shortlist reveal un-gated and gating save/intro/export behind signup (plus wiring founder_signup_started/completed) converts >=25% of preview viewers to signup-started at zero acquisition cost.
opportunities.baseline: 0 founder_signup_started / 0 completed in 7d (path unwired); 100% preview->account drop-off
opportunities.target: >=25% preview->signup_started; first non-zero account baseline (>=3) within 14d
opportunities.next_step: Shipped: inverted gate on /matches preview + founder_signup_started/completed wiring. 48h: confirm events emit on gate CTA. 14d: compare matches_preview vs url_first; Growth owns traffic reallocation.

opportunities.title: Funnel event observability + preview_requested capture
opportunities.problem: User-side funnel was blind; could not distinguish no-traffic from no-logging.
opportunities.hypothesis: Automated heartbeat + server-side preview_requested logging enables agent optimization.
opportunities.next_step: Monitor via npm run funnel:heartbeat and conversion-funnel snapshot; agents use metrics for experiments.

opportunities.title: Match engagement API + UI events
opportunities.problem: 3.7M matches exist but viewed/intro/contact events are not wired — we cannot optimize post-signup funnel.
opportunities.hypothesis: Instrumenting view → intro → contact will reveal where founders drop off and unlock engagement experiments.
opportunities.target: 5% intro rate on viewed matches within 30d of launch
opportunities.next_step: Live — verify intro/contact events accrue as real traffic hits Activate + match preview.

opportunities.title: Founder match nudge service
opportunities.problem: Founders submit URL but may not return to view matches.
opportunities.hypothesis: Email/in-app nudge with top 3 investor names increases return visits 2x.
opportunities.next_step: Shipped: post-preview email capture on /matches preview + share link. Monitor preview_email_captured in funnel snapshot.

opportunities.title: Weekly investor dealflow digest (MCP + email)
opportunities.problem: Investors lack a reason to log in after signup.
opportunities.hypothesis: Thesis-matched startup digest increases investor retention and intro acceptance.
opportunities.next_step: Design digest schema: top 5 startups by thesis fit + deployment velocity signal

opportunities.title: Preview matches before signup (matches_preview variant)
opportunities.problem: Founders may bounce before seeing value.
opportunities.hypothesis: Showing 3 blurred matches before account creation increases signup completion.
opportunities.next_step: BLIND: growth_event_count=1 in 7d — cannot compare variants. Gated behind founder_supply_seeding observability fix before any traffic-reallocation decision.

opportunities.title: Reject junk names at ingest
opportunities.problem: Low-quality startup names pollute match pool and depress GOD means.
opportunities.hypothesis: Entity-resolution gate at submit reduces C-tier approved startups by 30%.
opportunities.next_step: Run npm run pipeline:god-audit; tighten correlate-policy thresholds

opportunities.title: Why this investor? — match explain API
opportunities.problem: Founders see scores but not reasoning; investors distrust black-box ranking.
opportunities.hypothesis: Structured explain blocks (portfolio fit, stage, check size, recency) increase intro requests.
opportunities.next_step: Extend get_match_insights MCP tool with copy-ready explain blocks

opportunities.title: Visitor → signup → use → paid conversion loop
opportunities.problem: North star is signups but revenue requires pricing→checkout instrumentation and agent-driven experiments on each stage.
opportunities.hypothesis: Daily autopilot + pricing/checkout events + rotating LLM agents will compound conversion improvements week over week.
opportunities.target: Measurable preview→signup→checkout funnel; first pricing A/B winner
opportunities.next_step: pricing_oracle_cta promoted to running — trial_first vs value_first on Oracle checkout CTA. Monitor checkout_started by variant via npm run growth:cycle.
